Inside Hamlet's Mind

Act IV. Polonius is dead, Claudius sends Hamlet to England, Ophelia breaks, and Laertes returns for blood. You are the guiding voice choosing what Hamlet becomes.

The Chamber Waits

Inside Hamlet's Mind

Click to steady the view. WASD to move. E to answer as Hamlet's guiding voice. Esc to pause.
